aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — high-speed copper cable / PCB material
aleabit.thesis: Heat-shrink and 224G high-speed copper cable supplier — direct AI server interconnect play. 300亿 cap is starting to get crowded but the AEC/copper cable angle is real. NVIDIA GB200/300 rack interconnect beneficiary. The story has been found by the market, but the underlying material moat (cross-linked polymer dielectric) is genuine.

red_flags: PB 3.3 fair but not deep value
aleabit.ai_relevance: Direct — 224G AEC cables for AI rack interconnect
